creator: dryice@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Thanks for the PR. Could you please use /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/portlint
to check your port and fix the issues it raise? For example,

- use tab instead of space after variable names
- fill in Whom line
- fill in Data line
- make the $FreeBSD$ tag empty

You could use "portlint -A" to check cause this is a new port.


Thanks
-- 
Dryice @ http://dryice.name

>> Shut up and code!!!
